name: IRC_SOURCE_TRACKING
description: The IRC_SOURCE_TRACKING will contain all the tracking information about the Source of Application.

columns.Name: SOURCE_TRACKING_ID
columns.Comments: Primary key for the Source tracking table.

columns.Name: AGENCY_NAME
columns.Comments: Column to store Name for Agency.

columns.Name: AGENT_NAME
columns.Comments: Full Name of an Agent.

columns.Name: SOURCE_LEVEL
columns.Comments: will contain the source level value for the given record

columns.Name: DIMENSION_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to the dimension definition. (IRC_DIMENSION_DEF_B)

columns.Name: CAMPAIGN_CODE
columns.Comments: The campaign code pointing to the IRC_CAMPAIGNS_B table.

columns.Name: REQUISITION_ID
columns.Comments: The requisition ID that is stored in the IRC_REQUISITIONS_B table.

columns.Name: FROM_REQUISITION_ID
columns.Comments: The requisition ID that is stored in the IRC_REQUISITIONS_B table. Used for the add to req from another requisition.

columns.Name: TOKEN_ID
columns.Comments: The related token ID to is stored in IRC_CX_CNDT_EMAIL_TKNS table.

columns.Name: SUBMISSION_ID
columns.Comments: The submission ID that is stored in the IRC_SUBMISSIONS table.

columns.Name: PROSPECT_ID
columns.Comments: The related token ID to is stored in IRC_PROSPECTS table.

columns.Name: REFERRAL_ID
columns.Comments: The referral ID that is stored in the IRC_RF_REFERRALS table.

columns.Name: RECRUITER_ID
columns.Comments: The person id related to the recruiter that is stored in the PER_PERSONS table.

columns.Name: POOL_ID
columns.Comments: The pool id that is stored in the HRT_POOLS_B table.

columns.Name: CANDIDATE_NUMBER
columns.Comments: The person id related to the internal candidate that is stored in the IRC_CANDIDATES table.

columns.Name: SHARE_ID
columns.Comments: The share id that is stored IRC_RF_SHARES table.

columns.Name: PARENT_SOURCE_TRACKING_ID
columns.Comments: The parent source tracking id pointing to the same table IRC_SOURCE_TRACKING. table.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: FROM_POOL_ID
columns.Comments: The pool ID that is stored in the HRT_POOLS_B table. Used for the add to pool action from another candidate pool.

columns.Name: POOL_MEMBER_ID
columns.Comments: The pool member id related to pool member that is stored in the IRC_CAND_POOL_MEMBERS table.

columns.Name: SITE_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Foreign key to the IRC_CX_SITES_B table.

columns.Name: AGENT_ID
columns.Comments: The Agent Id that is stored in the IRC_AGENTS

columns.Name: AGENCY_ID
columns.Comments: The Agency Id that is stored in the IRC_AGENCIES

columns.Name: REFERRED_DATE
columns.Comments: Date of referral by the Agency

columns.Name: CAMPAIGN_POST_ID
columns.Comments: Post id of the social campaign posts. Foreign key to IRC_CAMP_ASSETS_B

columns.Name: STATUS_CODE
columns.Comments: Stores the status of the of the Source tracking record

columns.Name: EVENT_ID
columns.Comments: The id of the event that the candidate is currently part of. The Event ID that is stored in the IRC_REC_EVENTS_B table.

columns.Name: FROM_EVENT_ID
columns.Comments: The id of the event from which the candidate is added. Foreign key to IRC_REC_EVENTS_B.

columns.Name: INACTIVATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Date on which the Sourectracking record is inactivated
